description: Main entrance gate of the campus. Starting point for all visitors and students entering the building.
Ground floor main corridor connecting entrance, canteen, admin office, admission office and staircase.
Student canteen and food court serving meals and snacks on the ground floor.
Administrative office for student services, faculty inquiries and general administration.
Admission office for new student registrations, enrollment and admission inquiries.
Main staircase on the ground floor leading up to the first and second floors.
Main staircase on the first floor connecting ground floor and second floor.
First floor main corridor connecting library, computer lab, science lab and staircase.
Main library on the first floor where students study, read and borrow books.
Computer laboratory on the first floor for programming, research and practical sessions.
Science laboratory on the first floor for practical experiments and scientific research.
Main staircase on the second floor connecting to the first floor.
Second floor main corridor connecting lecture hall, clinic and staff room.
Main lecture hall on the second floor for large group sessions and presentations.
Student clinic on the second floor providing basic medical services and first aid.
Staff room on the second floor for faculty and teaching staff.
